title: Proposal to grant carbon dioxide transport and storage licences
body: "The Secretary of State for Energy Security and Net Zero gave notice on 6 September 2024, pursuant to Section 9(4) (as modified by Section 16 and Schedule 1) of the Energy Act 2023, of the proposal to grant carbon dioxide transport and storage licences to Liverpool Bay CCS Limited and Net Zero North Sea Storage Limited.   Update 17 October 2024  The period within which any representations or objections may be made with respect to the proposal to grant the Licences has now closed. No representations or objections were made within this period.  "
